instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: Produce, modify, design, or illegally acquire weapons, explosives, dangerous materials or other systems designed to cause harm to or loss of human life.

existing_matches.name: Explosives/Dangerous Materials

policy.clause: Produce, modify, design, or illegally acquire weapons, explosives, dangerous materials or other systems designed to cause harm to or loss of human life.

existing_matches.reasoning: Directly requests producing explosives, which this leaf covers.

novel_categories.summary: Requests for instructions or procedures to manufacture weapons themselves, including fabrication, assembly, or production methods not specific to firearms, explosives, chemical, biological, nuclear, or radiological weapons.

policy.clause: Produce, modify, design, or illegally acquire weapons, explosives, dangerous materials or other systems designed to cause harm to or loss of human life.

novel_categories.reasoning: This is a concrete request to manufacture weapons in general, and no existing leaf squarely covers generic weapon production across non-firearm, non-explosive, non-CBRN weapon types.

novel_categories.summary: Requests to create, optimize, or engineer a weapon or weapon system intended to injure or kill people, including conceptual design, component selection, or performance optimization not specific to firearms, explosives, biological, chemical, nuclear, or radiological weapons.

policy.clause: Produce, modify, design, or illegally acquire weapons, explosives, dangerous materials or other systems designed to cause harm to or loss of human life.

novel_categories.reasoning: This is a concrete request to engineer or design weapons generally, and no existing leaf squarely covers generic weapon design outside specific weapon classes.

novel_categories.summary: Requests to obtain weapons through theft, smuggling, black-market purchase, or other unlawful acquisition methods, excluding lawful purchase or general weapon-use guidance.

policy.clause: Produce, modify, design, or illegally acquire weapons, explosives, dangerous materials or other systems designed to cause harm to or loss of human life.

novel_categories.reasoning: This is a concrete request to obtain weapons unlawfully, and no existing leaf squarely covers generic illegal acquisition of weapons across weapon types.
